Slug.description: Lowercase kebab slug (RFC-007 identity), e.g. gh-a, bench-a.

error.description: Human-readable description of what went wrong.

ValidationError.description: A rejected write, naming the field and the bound it violated — the shape Phase 2 relays when a setpoint is refused (RFC-005).

bound.description: The violated constraint (e.g. "0..100" or "must be < humidity_high_pct").
